opinion.h: MILLER v. HAINES, DIRECTOR, DEPARTMENT OF MENTAL HYGIENE AND CORRECTION OF OHIO, ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE SUPREME COURT OF OHIO. No. 840. Decided January 15, 1968.
opinion.p: Freeman T. Eagleson, Jr., for appellant.
William B. Saxbe, Attorney General of Ohio, Winifred A. Dunton, Assistant Attorney General, and Charles S. Lopeman for appellees.
The motion to dismiss is granted and the appeal is dismissed for want of a substantial federal question.
MR. JUSTICE DOUGLAS is of the opinion that probable jurisdiction should be noted.
